roa.docketEntryComment: PC1203,4 ORDER SIGNED BY JUDGE TRACIE BROWN AND FILED IN COURT
DEFT'S PC1203,3 & PC1203,4 MOT FOR TERM/DISM FILED
DEFT'S PC17(B)(3) MOT TO REDUCE TO MISD & CHANGE TO CT PROB FILED

/CAL: DEFENDANT'S PC 1203,3 AND PC1203,4 MOTIONS/NP/MO GRTD/X: DEFENDANT'S MOTION FOR EARLY TERMINATION OF PROBATION PURSUANT TO PC 1203,3 IS GRANTED,/CTORD: PROBATION IN #2473911 IS HEREBY TERMINATED AS SUCCESSFUL/X: MOTION PURSUANT TO PC 1203,4 IS ALSO GRANTED BY THE COURT,/X: PURSUANT TO SIGNED AND FILED ORDER GUILTY PLEA IS SET ASIDE AND A NOT GUILTY PLEA IS ENTERED,/X:NO ORDERS WERE SUBMITTED TO THE COURT FOR SIGNING,/

/CAL  DEF PC 17(B) MOTION TO REDUCE & CHANGE TO COURT PROBATION/MO GRTD/XTHE COURT GRANTS MOTION FOR MISDEMEANOR REDUCTION PURSUANT TO PC 17(B),/TORD  CHARGE(S) REDUCED FROM A FELONY TO A MISDEMEANOR/X ORDER REDUCING CARGE(S) FROM A FELONY TO A MISDEMEANOR IS SIGNED AND FILED IN COURT,/CTORFORMAL PROBATION REDUCED TO COURT PROBATION, DEFENDANT'S REPORTING REQUEMENTS TO THE ADULT PROBATION DEPARTMENT ARE TERMINATED,/
/CAL:APD PC1203,9 TRANSFER FROM SAN MATEO COUNTY/MO GRTD/X:PROBATION TRANSFERRED FROM SAN MATEO COUNTY TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY/X:ORDER SIGNED BY THE COURT AND FILED/PROB EXT:04-10-15/
